action.reasoning: Observation: Data exploration shows 40 tasks, 1693 episodes with rgb(2,256,256,3), state(8), action(7) format. Action range is small deltas with gripper as last dim. Analysis: Need to adapt 2-view/8-D/7-D data to Pi0's 3-view/32-D/32-D format via zero-padding. Must verify Pi0 loading and forward pass API before committing to full training. Decision: Write comprehensive test+train script that validates Pi0 API, applies LoRA, trains for a few epochs, then save checkpoint. Also write predict.py for evaluation.
